title: Multithreaded Mapper Implementation
description: The lib/map directory in Hadoop's MapReduce architecture contains MultithreadedMapper.java, which implements a multithreaded Mapper. This allows concurrent map task execution, boosting throughput for non-CPU-intensive tasks. It manages a thread pool, with each thread executing a Mapper instance. The code ensures thread safety using SubMapRecordReader and SubMapRecordWriter for input/output. It relies on Hadoop classes and interfaces for seamless integration within the MapReduce framework.
